title: The Arctic Institute’s Queering the Arctic Series 2023: Introduction
summary: TAI's 2023 Series about queer life in the Arctic showcases different approaches to the lives of the LGBTQ+-community in the Arctic. The post The Arctic Institute’s Queering the Arctic Series 2023: Introduction appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .

title: Applications open for tuition-free youth science and art expeditions
summary: Inspiring Girls* Expeditions Alaska is inviting applications for a unique suite of tuition-free backcountry science and art education programs in summer 2024.
